---
id: receive-inbound-webhook-from-a-messaging-platform
title: "Receive inbound webhook from a messaging platform"
description: "Generic webhook endpoint for all connectors. Verifies HMAC signature, parses the message, and enqueues for async processing."

api:

  as={"h1"}

  children={"Receive inbound webhook from a messaging platform"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/webhook/{connectorType}/{integrationId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Generic webhook endpoint for all connectors. Verifies HMAC signature, parses the message, and enqueues for async processing.
